---
title: "[XSTSF] Tone sandhi patterns for trisyllabic tokens"
output: html_document
author: Yibing Shi
date: "Last updated: 2023-07-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra) 
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(plotly)
library(writexl)
library(readxl)
```


## Citation sandhi  

## Data frame construction  
```{r data-construction}
# Data structure: 
  # 8 speakers * 44 tokens *  10 normalised time points * 3 syllables = 10,560
  # HH-X:   [1+2MH shang]   小青椒, 小苦瓜, 小樱桃, 小水牛, 小黄瓜, 小杨梅
  #         [1+2MH ping]    新书包, 新手机, 新书房, 新手链, 新皮袄, 新皮鞋
  #         [1+2VO shang]   采樱花, 采樱桃, 采梅花, 采杨梅
  #         [2+1VL]         修车工, 开锁人, 修门工, 开门人
  #         [2+1LL shang]   苦瓜籽, 苦瓜皮, 草莓籽, 水牛毛
  #         [2+1LL ping]    青椒籽, 青椒皮, 樱桃籽, 樱桃皮
  # LHL-X:  [1+2MH]         老青椒, 老樱桃, 老黄瓜, 老杨梅 
  # ping    [1+2VO]         卖青椒, 卖樱桃, 卖黄瓜, 卖杨梅
  #         [2+1VL]         造纸厂, 卖花人, 造船厂, 卖茶人
  #         [2+1LL]         黄瓜籽, 黄瓜皮, 杨梅籽, 杨桃皮



# all trisyllabic tokens
f0_tri_ct <- f0_all %>% filter(focus_condition == 'citation' & diortri == 'tri')
```


## Data visualisation  
```{r data-vis-all}
# check syntax categories
for (var in unique(f0_tri_ct$syntax)) {
  print(var)
}

# visualisation of individual contours by token under each syntax category
for (var in unique(f0_tri_ct$syntax)) {
  data_frame <- f0_tri_ct %>% filter(syntax == var)
  list <- as.list(unique(data_frame$citation_no))
  plotList <- lapply(list, function(ind){
  x <- data_frame %>%
    filter(citation_no == ind) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=factor(time), y=norm_f0, group=interaction(syllable_no, ind_no), color=ind_no, linetype=ind_no))+ 
    geom_line()+
    ylim(-2.5, 2.5)
  ggsave(filename = paste0('plots/', var, '_no', ind, '_ct.jpg'), width = 6, height = 4)
  x
})
  var2 <- gsub('+', '', var, fixed = TRUE)
  assign(paste0('ct_', var2), ggarrange(plotlist = plotList))
}
```
